summary: Backend-only validation of Clause 44 Release 3 (Col 8 'Excluded' as a first-class classification bucket + 7-column summary pivot + Col 8 Excel sheet + new DEFAULT_DISCLAIMER verbatim text + transactions endpoint accepting bucket=col8). Wrote 16 NEW live HTTP tests in /app/backend/tests/test_clause44_release3_live.py — all pass. Combined Clause 44 regression suite (R1 unit + R1 live + R2 unit + R2 live + R3 unit + R3 live + iteration_patch) = 81/81 passed in 6.66s. End-to-end against the seeded run_8d427d1f97e0 (ABC Textile Mills) on the preview env — Col 2 (gross) identity = Col 3+4+5+7+8 holds when 3 ledgers are elected as exclusions across non_cash/sch3/other sub-buckets. Excel workbook now ships 7 sheets (added 'Col 8 · Excluded' with ICAI sub-bucket band headers + grand total row). DEFAULT_DISCLAIMER round-trips verbatim through PATCH /selections → /export.

minor.issue: Both files asserted len(workbook.sheetnames) == 6 — stale after R3 added the 7th 'Col 8 · Excluded' sheet. Fixed by updating both assertions to == 7 and adding sheet-presence check (test-script-fix scope only).

verified.combined_clause44_suite: 81/81 (R1 unit + R1 live + R2 unit + R2 live + R3 unit + R3 live + iteration_patch)
verified.step0_excluded_wins: When 3 ledgers (Wages A/c, Salary Exp, Interest on Bank O/D) are elected as excluded with sub-bucket categories (non_cash/sch3/other), each shows col8 > 0 and col7 == 0 — Step 0 beats every other cascade step.
verified.gross_identity_col2: summary.col2_total == col3 + col4 + col5 + col7 + col8 (within rounding) on live ABC Textile run with exclusions elected.
verified.reportable_identity: summary.reportable_total == col6 + col7 (Col 8 explicitly excluded from Reportable).
verified.run_get_returns_col8: GET /api/runs/{id} returns summary.col8, summary.reportable_total, recon.col8_total, and recon.excluded_lines split into non_cash / sch3 / other sub-buckets.
verified.transactions_bucket_col8: GET /api/runs/{id}/transactions?bucket=col8 returns ONLY col8 vouchers (regex pattern accepts col8). Invalid 'col9' rejected with 422.
verified.excel_seven_sheets: Workbook ships exactly 7 sheets: Clause 44 Summary, Reconciliation, Col 3 · Exempt, Col 4 · Composition, Col 5 · Other Reg ITC, Col 7 · Unregistered, Col 8 · Excluded.
verified.summary_seven_col_pivot: Clause 44 Summary sheet header carries Col 2 / Col 3 / Col 4 / Col 5 / Col 6 / Col 7 / Col 8 labels (verified by openpyxl scan on live workbook).
verified.col8_sheet_band_headers: Col 8 · Excluded sheet contains ICAI sub-bucket band headers ('Non-cash charges', 'Schedule III items', 'Other exclusions') plus a final 'Col 8 Total' grand total row, and lists each elected ledger by name.
verified.default_disclaimer_verbatim: controller.DEFAULT_DISCLAIMER contains all 8 user-dictated phrases (classification of expenditure under Clause 44; based solely on the books of account; purchase ledgers internally designated by the entity as exempt-supply ledgers; absence of an ITC-input ledger; both as adopted and affirmed by management; RCM vouchers and purchases from foreign suppliers are reported under Column 7; true and complete extract of its books; (Ref: ICAI Guidance Note on Tax Audit, Para 79.20 / 79.21.)).
verified.disclaimer_round_trip_to_excel: PATCH /selections {disclaimer_text=DEFAULT_DISCLAIMER} → GET /export → Reconciliation sheet contains both anchor phrases verbatim.
verified.regression_no_client_leak: GET /api/clients still returns exactly the 3 original clients (Velav Garments India P Limited, Allman Knitwear, ABC Textile Mills).
verified.teardown_state: After test run, run_8d427d1f97e0 has exclusion_selection=[], exclusion_categories={}, col8=0, reportable_total=col2_total=80,72,786.27 — DB is back to baseline.

critical_code_review_comments: controller.py — `_run_classification` correctly threads `excluded_ledgers` and `exclusion_categories` from the run doc into both classify_vouchers (Step 0) and compute_recon_and_filter (sub-bucket detail). The deletion of the old filter step in compute_recon_and_filter is faithful to the new contract: Col 8 is now reported, not stripped.
controller.py — transactions endpoint regex `^(col2|col3|col4|col5|col6|col7|col8|all)$` correctly accepts col8 and rejects unknowns with FastAPI 422.
controller.py — DEFAULT_DISCLAIMER is the verbatim user-approved text. The round-trip path via PATCH /selections {disclaimer_text} → GET /export confirms persistence.

exports.py — Summary sheet now carries 7 data columns and the new 'Col 8 · Excluded' sheet groups by ICAI sub-bucket band headers (Non-cash charges / Schedule III items / Money / Securities / Capex add-back / Other exclusions) with a final 'Col 8 Total · Excluded expenditure' row.
service.py — `_classify_single_line` Step 0 (excluded ledger → col8) is checked first, beating Input A / RCM / URD / inference. Verified live — elected ledgers no longer surface in col7.

(minor / test hygiene only) test_clause44_release1_live.py and test_clause44_release2_live.py used hard-coded `== 6` sheet count. Both updated to `== 7` to align with the R3 contract. Recommend folding these into a single shared fixture/constant in conftest.py to avoid drift on future column additions.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_clause44_release1_live.py (test-only fix: 6 → 7 sheet assertion + Col 8 sheet presence check)
seed_data_creation: None. Used the existing seeded run_8d427d1f97e0 / cli_ad137f29aebb (ABC Textile Mills). The with_exclusions fixture re-generates the run with 3 elected exclusions for the duration of the test module; the baseline_run fixture's teardown POSTs another /generate with excluded_ledgers=[] + exclusion_categories={} so the DB ends in a clean baseline (col8=0, reportable=col2). No test clients created. DB still holds exactly the 3 original clients.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Release 3 live regression suite is /app/backend/tests/test_clause44_release3_live.py (16 tests, ~2s). It elects 3 exclusions (Wages A/c→non_cash, Salary Exp→sch3, Interest on Bank O/D→other) on run_8d427d1f97e0, validates Col 8 cascade + 7-col summary pivot + Col 8 Excel sheet + transactions?bucket=col8 + DEFAULT_DISCLAIMER round-trip, and tears down via /generate with empty exclusions. Combined with R1/R2 unit+live + R3 unit + iteration_patch = 81 green tests. The previous iter19 minor items (test_clause44_backend.py hardcoded URL + test_docs.py idempotent_upsert seed hygiene) are still pre-existing — not addressed in this iteration since out of R3 scope.
rca of the issue: n/a — no Release 3 bugs found. The two pre-existing failures in test_clause44_release1_live.py / test_clause44_release2_live.py were stale `== 6 sheets` assertions (test-data drift, not a product bug); both updated to `== 7` to match the R3 contract.
